title: mentha × suavis
intro: Mentha × suavis, also known as sweet mint, is a hybrid plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a cross between Mentha aquatica and Mentha spicata. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic due to the presence of menthol and other compounds. Sweet mint has various health benefits, including relieving nausea and headaches, soothing respiratory issues, and reducing stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
